what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel attachment of type board_items that points to a board item (board://item-fff947f4) in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no prose body
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone
conventions: board:// URI scheme for cross-resource target
concerns: no body or summary; purpose of the attachment is implicit
referenced board item is opaque without external lookup
notes: A bare attachment metadata stub linking the dragnet-development channel to board item item-fff947f4.
questions: What content or message does this attachment annotate?

intention_signals: It appears to capture a persistent link between a channel memory and a specific board item so the relationship can be retrieved or threaded later.

contribution: Preserves the channel-to-board-item linkage and its creation timestamp, which a fused system would keep for traceability.
